spec_match.rationale: Perfect comparison sandbox mapping the old manual scripting method to the new declarative focusgroup attribute.

interactive.rationale: Great keyboard sandbox. Both panels are fully active (using old roving tabindex JS versus native browser focusgroup) and click states sync appropriately.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Strong educational alignment showing how many code lines focusgroup eliminates (40+ lines down to 0 JS logic).

edge_cases.rationale: Covers multiple input configurations and lists exact code differences.

references.rationale: Links directly to the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Standard code blocks, clean margins, and nice checked visual indicator elements.

summary: The roving-tabindex-compare is an outstanding, clean educational exercise demonstrating exactly why declarative standards are better than manual scripting.
